title: dtree queue spearhead/quick-wins
description: Queries unblocked proposed decisions: spearhead = critical+high (priority desc, oldest first); quick-wins = low+medium (priority desc, oldest first). --next prints first only. --output. Excludes assumptions.

title: dtree status / reindex / sync / fsck
description: status: repo health (index dirty, external edits, dangling refs, etc.). reindex: rebuild SQLite. sync: handle external edits/deletes/creates with prompts. fsck: validate all invariants and report violations without modifying.

title: dtree audit ls/show/replay
description: ls: filters (actor, action, kind, since, until, decision, tree); cursor pagination; --output. show <event-id>: full payload. replay --at <ts>: reconstructs state from index/JSONL; --output yaml/json prints all decisions at that moment.

title: dtree find: FTS5 search across decisions
description: Searches summary + decision_full_description + recommended_full + actual_choice + actual_choice_reason + tags. Supports --tree filter, --output, ranking by relevance.

title: dtree delete (soft + --hard)
description: Default soft: move to .deleted/ + audit event. --hard removes file; payload preserves content. Hard delete with incoming refs prompts for cleanup options. Non-interactive requires --force-delete-with-cleanup or --force-delete-with-orphans.

title: dtree relate / unrelate
description: relate <src> <type> <target>: validates target exists, no cycle for blocks/supersedes, no self-ref. Idempotent (no error on duplicate). unrelate removes. supersedes refused via this command — use dtree supersede.

title: dtree decide / assume
description: decide: --choice, --reason, --by (repeatable), --is-recommended. Validates required fields. Emits 'decide' event. assume: shortcut that creates+decides as priority=assumption in one operation.

title: dtree scope-out / supersede / undecide / restore
description: scope-out: --reason. supersede <old> <new>: creates supersedes edge + flips old to superseded. undecide: clears outcome fields, status → proposed. restore: from soft-delete or scope-out or superseded (with edge cleanup prompts as needed). All emit audit events.

title: dtree show <id>
description: Resolves ULID prefix or fuzzy summary. Renders human/json/yaml output formats. Includes relationships with target summaries (resolved via index).

title: dtree ls: list decisions with rich filters and output formats
description: Filters: --status, --priority, --tag, --creator, --decider, --assigned, --recommender, --since, --until, --tree, --unblocked, --search. --output human|json|yaml|ids (auto-detect tty). --limit, --cursor pagination. Default filter: status in (proposed, decided).

title: dtree actor add/list/show/rename/archive/link
description: actor add creates handle/name/email/kind/active=true. rename rewrites references across trees. archive sets active=false. link adopts from global identities into project actors.yaml. All emit audit events.

title: dtree new: create a decision (interactive + flags + editor)
description: Opens $EDITOR with templated YAML if no body flags. Supports --description, --priority, --tag, --recommended-summary, --recommended-full, --assignee, --from-file, --from-stdin, --no-edit. Writes YAML, audit event, index update atomically.

title: dtree tree create/list/show/rename/archive/delete
description: All six subcommands. tree.yaml metadata. Cross-tree relationship rewrite on rename. Archive sets archived=true. Delete with decisions requires --force + name typed-back. All emit appropriate audit events.

title: dtree init: initialize .decisions/, write .gitattributes, register first actor
description: Creates .decisions/{config.yaml, actors.yaml, trees.yaml, .gitattributes, audit/}. Pulls git config user.{name,email} as defaults. Interactive prompts (skipped with --non-interactive + flags). Writes initial 'tree_create' / 'actor_add' / 'config_change' audit events. Refuses if .decisions/ already exists.

title: dtree config get/set/unset/list/edit
description: All five subcommands. --local/--global flags. Resolved values show source layer. config edit opens $EDITOR on the appropriate file.

title: External edit detection (sha256)
description: internal/sync/external.go: Stat each YAML file, compare sha256 vs index. Return list of mismatches. Sync(action) handles record-as-external_edit / revert / abort. Hooks into status command and pre-mutation paths.

title: Optimistic concurrency via _rev (last event_id)
description: Add _rev to decision struct. On every mutation: read current _rev, write new event, update decision._rev to new event_id. CLI mutations accept --expect-rev. HTTP accepts If-Match. Mismatch returns 409/conflict error.

title: Three-layer config (global/local/env/flags)
description: internal/config/config.go: Load() merges ~/.config/dtree/config.yaml + .decisions/config.yaml + DTREE_* env. Resolve(key) returns (value, source-layer) for whoami debug. Set(scope, key, value) writes to appropriate layer.

title: Identity resolution + actor registry
description: internal/identity/resolve.go: Resolve() returns (handle, source) walking flag→env→local→global. Validates handle exists in actors.yaml. Errors with actionable hints when missing.

title: Domain validation engine
description: internal/validate/validate.go: Decision invariants (status=decided requires actual_choice/reason/decided_by≥1, recommended_by requires recommended_summary, etc.). Cycle detection for blocks/supersedes via DFS. Self-relationship rejection. Used by both write paths and fsck.

title: Index schema (decisions, events, relationships, actors, trees, FTS5)
description: Tables: decisions(id, tree, summary, status, priority, creator, ..._rev, content_sha256), events(event_id, ts, actor, action, kind, tree, target_id, payload_json, source_file), relationships(source, target, type, tree, created_event_id), actors(handle, name, email, kind, active), trees(slug, ..., archived). FTS5 virtual tables for decisions and events. Indexes on common query patterns.

title: Replay engine: rebuild index from disk + audit log
description: internal/index/replay.go: Reindex(repoPath) walks .decisions/ scanning YAML files and replays audit JSONL into SQLite. Idempotent. Detects duplicate IDs and refuses to start. dtree reindex CLI hooks here.

title: Audit log JSONL append + read + replay
description: internal/audit/audit.go: Append(event) writes to .decisions/<tree>/audit/YYYY-MM.jsonl (or repo-level). Read(filters) iterates events ordered by (ts, event_id). ReplayState(at) reconstructs state by folding events. event_id is ULID-based dedup key.

title: SQLite index initialization + WAL mode + busy timeout
description: internal/index/db.go: Open(path) sets WAL mode, busy_timeout=5000, foreign_keys=on. CreateSchema runs on fresh DB. _meta table tracks schema_version.

title: Atomic file write helpers
description: internal/fsutil/atomic.go: WriteAtomic(path, contents) → tmp file in same dir + fsync + rename. AppendLine(path, contents) → O_APPEND for JSONL. Sha256File(path). Flock helper for index rebuilds.

title: YAML serialization for decisions/trees/actors/config
description: internal/storage/yaml.go: ReadDecision/WriteDecision, ReadTree/WriteTree, ReadActors/WriteActors. Atomic writes via fsutil. Validation invoked on write. Uses goccy/go-yaml for round-trip preservation of comments where possible.

title: Bootstrap Go module + cobra root command
description: Set up go.mod (module github.com/cgould/dtree), cobra-based cmd/dtree/main.go with root command, version subcommand, and Makefile (setup/build/test/lint targets). Acceptance: 'go build ./cmd/dtree && ./dtree version' prints a version.

title: Define core domain types
description: internal/core/types.go: Decision, Tree, Actor, Event, Relationship, Status, Priority, RelationshipType. Include schema_version constants. JSON+YAML tags. Validation hooks via go-playground/validator tags.

title: ULID generation utility
description: internal/ulid/ulid.go: New() returns Crockford base32 ULID (26 chars). Parse() validates. Time-sortable. Uses oklog/ulid/v2. Includes deterministic generator for tests.

title: Epic: Foundation — domain types, storage, audit, config
Go test setup + coverage for core packages
description: Test files for core/types, ulid, fsutil, storage/yaml, audit, index, validate, identity. Aim for >70% coverage on core packages. Table-driven tests where natural.

title: go:embed integration + dtree ui command
description: internal/ui/embed.go with //go:embed all:dist directive. Server mounts embedded SPA at / (catch-all to index.html for client-side routing). dtree ui command starts server + opens browser. --no-browser flag.

title: Typed fetch wrapper (~50 lines)
description: ui/src/api/client.ts: wraps fetch with X-Dtree-As header injection, JSON encode/decode, Problem Details error parsing. Uses tygo-generated types for response shapes.

title: TanStack Query setup + query key registry
description: QueryClient with sensible defaults (staleTime 30s, refetchOnFocus). Hierarchical query key registry (qk.decisions.list/detail/history, qk.audit.*, qk.metrics.*, etc.). Mutation hooks pattern with optimistic update + rollback.

title: tygo Go→TS type generation
description: tygo.yaml config, make api target. Generates ui/src/api/types.ts from Go structs in internal/core/types.go and HTTP handler input/output structs. CI fails if generated types differ from committed.

title: dtree mcp command (stdio + --read-only)
description: Wires MCP server. --as required. --read-only disables mutation tools. --tree scopes. --http for HTTP+SSE transport.

title: MCP server bootstrap (mark3labs/mcp-go)
description: internal/mcp/server.go: stdio transport default, --http :PORT optional. Single fixed actor via --as. Validates handle in actors.yaml at startup. Tool-call logging to stderr.

title: MCP tool definitions (~17 tools mirroring HTTP)
description: Tools: list_trees, get_tree, list_decisions, get_decision, search_decisions, create_decision, update_decision, decide, undecide, scope_out, supersede, relate, unrelate, list_audit, replay_state, list_actors, get_state_summary. Reuses Go structs for input schemas.

title: dtree serve command
description: Wires HTTP server. --listen flag (default 127.0.0.1:0, prints assigned port). --read-only. Graceful shutdown. Prints listen URL.

title: HTTP: audit endpoints + SSE stream
description: GET /v1/audit (filterable), GET /v1/audit/{event_id}, GET /v1/audit/stream (SSE), GET /v1/audit/export (JSONL stream from disk). Polls SQLite at ~500ms for SSE in v1.

title: HTTP: trees endpoints (CRUD)
description: GET /v1/trees, GET /v1/trees/{tree}, POST /v1/trees, PATCH /v1/trees/{tree}, DELETE /v1/trees/{tree}. Validation; auth via X-Dtree-As; If-Match for mutations.

title: HTTP: decisions endpoints (CRUD + actions)
description: GET/POST list+create, GET/PATCH/DELETE single, plus action endpoints (decide/undecide/scope-out/supersede/restore/relate/unrelate). GET history. Cursor pagination. Filters mirror CLI.

title: HTTP server: chi router + middleware + Problem Details errors
description: internal/server/server.go: chi.Router, request logging, recovery, CORS for localhost, X-Dtree-As header parsing into context. Problem Details (RFC 9457) error envelope. /v1 prefix on all routes.

title: dtree migrate (schema migration framework)
description: Per-version migration registry in internal/migrations/. dtree migrate runs pending. --dry-run reports what would change. Emits schema_migrate audit events. Index migrations auto-run on startup; disk migrations explicit.

title: dtree graph deps/downstream/closure/cycles/viz
description: deps <id>: incoming blocks. downstream <id>: outgoing blocks. closure <id> --type --depth: bounded transitive set. cycles: lists cycles in blocks/supersedes (should be empty). viz <id> --format dot: graphviz DOT output.

title: dtree edit <id>: open in editor for in-place changes
description: Opens $EDITOR on a temp copy of the YAML. On save, validates + diffs vs current + writes audit 'update' event with before/after for changed fields. Cancel preserves original.

title: dtree whoami + dtree as <handle> <cmd>
description: whoami prints handle + source layer. 'dtree as <handle> <subcmd>' is a one-shot identity override (sets DTREE_AS for the wrapped invocation).

title: Schema migration framework + v1 baseline
description: internal/migrations/registry.go: ordered list of migration funcs. v0_to_v1.go is identity (no-op baseline). dtree migrate runs registered. Index migrations auto-run on startup. Tests for migrations.

title: Vitest setup + initial UI tests
description: Vitest config. Initial tests for filter pills, query keys, identity selector, decision detail forms. React Testing Library.

title: CI workflow (GitHub Actions)
description: .github/workflows/ci.yml: matrix Go test, Vitest, biome check, go vet, tygo regen check (fail if generated types differ), make build smoke test on linux/darwin.

title: Dashboard: recommendation acceptance metric (headline)
description: Big stat card: agent recommendation acceptance %. Breakdown bar by priority. Plus per-person grouped bar (priority × actor) with kind-toggle filter (human/agent).

title: Tree-wide audit table view
description: HeroUI Table with filter pills + drawer detail. Cursor-based useInfiniteQuery. FTS5 search. Click row → drawer shows full payload as before/after diff (simple inline implementation, no diff library).

title: Top-level layout (nav + sidebar + tree selector)
description: App shell: top nav (logo, tree selector, identity, +new), collapsible sidebar (links to graph/list/kanban/queues/audit/timeline/dashboard). Responsive (sidebar collapses on narrow screens).

title: Graph view (React Flow + dagre)
description: React Flow setup. dagre layered layout (TB default, LR per-tree config). Custom decision node component (priority border, status overlay, summary, tags, attribution). Custom edges per relationship type. nodesDraggable=false. Minimap hidden. Toolbar: fit view, zoom, toggle labels. Filter prompt at 500 nodes.

title: Per-decision audit flowchart (React Flow LR)
description: Inside History tab. Reuses React Flow + dagre with LR direction. Custom audit-event node component (color-coded by action type, latest event marker). Click selects → renders detail card below.

title: Filter pills component (shared across views)
description: Component for status/priority/tag/creator/decider/since pills with add/remove/clear. URL-driven state. Reused by ls table, kanban, audit table, dashboard.

title: Decision detail panel (tabs + actions)
description: Tabs: Detail, Recommendation, Outcome, History, Relationships. Action buttons by status. Plain useState forms (no RHF). Validates server-side. Optimistic mutations.

title: SSE hook for live updates
description: ui/src/hooks/useAuditStream.ts: EventSource with reconnection. On event, selectively invalidates TanStack Query keys based on event kind/target. Single instance mounted at App level.

title: Identity selector in nav + first-run flow
description: Dropdown in top nav. Lists handles registered in this project AND present in user's global config. Selection persists. Detects unconfigured identity, redirects to onboarding.

title: Zustand store (identity, prefs, last-viewed)
description: ui/src/store/app.ts: identity (with persist middleware to localStorage), lastTree, sidebarCollapsed, audit-view-mode (flow|table). Selectors for fine-grained subscription.

title: wouter routing setup with deep-linkable filters
description: Routes: / (redirect), /trees, /trees/:tree (graph default), /trees/:tree/list, /trees/:tree/kanban, /trees/:tree/queue/:mode, /trees/:tree/decisions/:id (overlay), /trees/:tree/audit, /trees/:tree/timeline, /dashboard, /settings/identity. URL-driven filter state via useSearchParams shim.

title: HeroUI v2 + Tailwind v4 + Lucide setup
description: Tailwind v4 config, HeroUI provider in App, base typography/colors, dark mode toggle scaffolding. Lucide individual icon imports.

title: Vite + React + TS scaffold for ui/
description: ui/ directory: package.json (pnpm), vite.config.ts (with API proxy in dev), tsconfig.json, index.html, src/main.tsx, src/App.tsx. Biome for lint/format. Vitest for tests. Modern-evergreen-only browser targets.

title: MCP resource definitions
description: Resources: dtree://trees, dtree://trees/{tree}, dtree://trees/{tree}/decisions/{id}, dtree://actors. URI parsing + content fetch.

title: HTTP: metrics endpoints (parallel-fetched)
description: /v1/metrics/{summary,status-breakdown,priority-distribution,outstanding-by-priority,activity,contributors,recommendation-acceptance}. SQL aggregations on index. Filters: trees, from, to, priority, identity_kind.

title: HTTP: auth (localhost-trust + tokens for network bind)
description: Localhost mode: X-Dtree-As required, validated against actors. Network mode (--listen 0.0.0.0): Bearer tokens via dtree token create --as <handle>. Refuse network bind without auth.

title: HTTP: actors endpoints
description: GET /v1/actors, POST /v1/actors, PATCH /v1/actors/{handle}.

title: HTTP: queues endpoints
description: GET /v1/trees/{tree}/queue?mode=spearhead|quick-wins. Returns ordered full decision objects.

title: HTTP: state replay endpoint
description: GET /v1/trees/{tree}/state?at=<ts>. Replays events into snapshot. Cached by at value.

title: dtree rename <id> [<slug>]
description: Regenerates slug (auto from summary if not specified). Renames YAML file. Emits 'rename' audit event with old_slug/new_slug. ID unchanged.

title: Dashboard: summary + status + priority + outstanding charts
description: 4 summary scalar cards. Status breakdown (stacked bar). Priority distribution (bar). Outstanding by priority (bar with % overlay).

title: Dashboard: activity over time + contributors
description: Stacked area chart of events per granularity (auto-picked by range). Top contributors horizontal bar (top 10).

title: Timeline scrubber on graph view
description: Slider with event-density sparkline (custom 1D SVG, ~30 lines). Snap-to-event on release. Keyboard ←/→ steps. 'Return to now' banner when scrubbed. Driven by /v1/state?at; cached by TanStack Query. Past-state node coloring reflects state at T.

title: Dashboard scaffold + Recharts setup
description: Recharts dependency added. /dashboard route. Filters bar (trees multi, date range, priority, identity kind). 4-column responsive grid. Manual refresh + SSE-driven selective invalidation.

title: Quick wins queue view
description: Card view with prev/next URL routing. Algorithm via /v1/queue?mode=quick-wins. Action buttons (accept rec, custom, scope-out, skip, view in graph). Auto-advance on SSE decide. Empty state with switch to spearhead suggestion.

title: Spearhead queue view (reuses quick-wins component)
description: Same component as quick wins, mode=spearhead. Shared ergonomics.

title: Kanban view (read-only swimlanes)
description: 4 swimlanes: proposed/decided/out_of_scope/superseded (always visible). Sort priority desc, oldest first. No drag. Click card → detail panel. Filter prompt at 500 decisions. SSE-driven card movement on status changes.

title: MCP notifications (resources changed)
description: Emit notifications/resources/list_changed and notifications/resources/updated when audit events land. Reuses SSE infrastructure.

title: dtree completion + version polish
description: cobra-generated bash/zsh/fish completion scripts. dtree version with build commit, build date, schema_version.

title: UI polish pass: keyboard shortcuts, focus, empty states, errors
description: cmd-k global search shim. j/k queue navigation. Tab order across modals. Empty states with HeroUI illustrations. Error boundary at root. Toast on mutation errors with Problem Details detail field.
